nasb.text: through whom we have received grace and apostleship to bring about the obedience of faith among all the Gentiles for His name’s sake,

esv.text: through whom we have received grace and apostleship to bring about the obedience of faith for the sake of his name among all the nations,

cnv.text: 我們從他領受了恩典和使徒的職分，在萬族中使人因他的名相信而順服，

ccb.text: 我们从祂领受了恩典并成为使徒，要带领万民信从祂，使祂的名得荣耀。

csbs.text: 我们从他领受了恩典和使徒的职份，为了他名的缘故，要在万民中带来信仰上的顺从；
